settings.title: Conference Tables
settings.description: Meeting room and conference tables in all sizes and shapes.

settings.title: Training & Folding Tables
settings.description: Folding and nesting training tables for flexible classrooms and multi-use rooms.

settings.title: Height-Adjustable Meeting Tables

settings.title: Collaborative & Agile Tables
settings.description: Modular collaborative surfaces for open-plan and agile workplaces.

settings.body: Canada's largest commercial furniture manufacturer — Global's conference, training, and collaborative tables are proven across Ontario's institutions and government offices.

settings.question: Are meeting and training tables covered under OECM Agreement 2025-470?
settings.answer: Yes. Conference tables, training and folding tables, height-adjustable meeting tables, and collaborative agile tables in this collection are all covered under OECM Agreement 2025-470. Ontario school boards, colleges, hospitals, and municipalities can purchase on an OECM purchase order. Call 1-800-835-9565 or email quotes@brantbusinessinteriors.com referencing the agreement.

settings.question: What's the difference between conference, training, and collaborative tables?
settings.answer: Conference tables are sized for scheduled meetings — typical seat counts of 6, 8, 10, or 12, with custom lengths available — and tend to stay fixed in place. Training tables are lighter, foldable or wheeled, and built for rooms that get reconfigured between sessions. Height-adjustable meeting tables suit hybrid teams who want a stand-up huddle option. Collaborative agile tables are mid-height and modular, used in open-plan zones for ad-hoc team work. Tell us the room and the meeting style and we'll recommend a configuration.

settings.question: Can power and data be integrated into the table?
settings.answer: Yes — most conference, meeting, and training tables can be specified with cable grommets and integrated power modules depending on the manufacturer and table series. We itemize the available power options on the quote so your facilities team can confirm electrical access points before the table is installed.

settings.question: Can you quote custom-size conference or training tables?
settings.answer: Yes. Stock-size tables ship faster, but custom dimensions, custom edge profiles, and matched veneers are quotable on most series — particularly with Global Furniture Group and Heartwood. Custom builds take longer than stock items. Call 1-800-835-9565 with the dimensions, finish, and seat count and we'll send the quote with a manufacturer-confirmed ship date.

settings.hero_subtitle: Commercial tables for every meeting format — conference, training, café, and multi-purpose. OECM-eligible, delivered and installed.
settings.intro_text: From 20-foot boardroom tables to nesting training tables that store in a closet — Brant Business Interiors carries every table format for institutional environments. OECM Agreement 2025-470 covers conference, training, and collaborative tables province-wide. Quote in 1 business day.
